155.reason: [when a single '&' or '|' is encountered, it is added to errors, but then this line still tries to get its type from operators, which returns "Invalid symbol"; however, the code proceeds to create a Token with that invalid type and adds it to tokens—this incorrectly adds an invalid token to the output instead of only recording the error]
